issues.description: Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Card text states 'during this turn', which means the effect lasts for the current turn phase only, not until end of turn.
Target scope should be 'OpponentCharacter' with proper selection limit. 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' is not standard; should use scope with maxSelect or similar constraint to enforce 'up to 1'.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] [When Attacking] Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −3 cost during this turn.
